purpose: Make the HS-JEPA mechanism falsifiable instead of only descriptive.

ablations.expected_failure: listener responsibility becomes prior-heavy and cohort/time generalization weakens.
ablations.measurement: drop in listener orientation, worse stress performance under cohort/time split.

ablations.expected_failure: representation can no longer predict hidden state under semantic masks.
ablations.measurement: masked representation prediction energy loses separation from null.

ablations.expected_failure: the same latent move is applied to wrong outcomes/listeners.
ablations.measurement: target/listener action precision drops while aggregate score may look locally stable.

ablations.expected_failure: unsafe latent signals are translated into overbroad output moves.
ablations.measurement: toxicity or negative-sensor alignment rises; high-energy tails worsen.

ablations.expected_failure: local action gains break the domain manifold.
ablations.measurement: selected actions lose energy advantage versus feasible null bundles.

ablations.expected_failure: collapse, split shortcut, or public-only behavior is overclaimed as architecture.
ablations.measurement: green score without null/stress survival is marked non-releasable.

minimum_publishable_evidence: core module removal changes downstream behavior
action-health removal increases toxic action rate
counterfactual listener-dropout exposes at least one single-listener shortcut or validates a robust action field
anti-shortcut validation rejects at least one tempting but false shortcut
